ModMetaData.name: Edge of Descension - Stuncaster 3.0
ModMetaData.description:
Descend into madness, crave violence and avenge yourself from your past mistakes.
Stuncaster returns! Now with enhanced abilities and features, rewarding the stuncaster with power that scales with their psychic sensitivity.
Reign supreme by psychically freezing the perceptions of all but yourself, unlocking oppurtunities in the midst of the chaos, as only you can move and act.
ModMetaData.author: Rabbit
